title: Short title
doc_html:
PART VI-A.  MEDICAL ASSISTANCE

PROGRAMS INTEGRITY LAW

SUBPART A.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§437.1.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the "Medical Assistance Programs Integrity Law".

Acts 1997, No. 1373, §1.
